ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code representing the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code used in the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp_data" (
  "gdp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GDP record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the GDP value */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the GDP value */,
  "gdp_value" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product value for the year */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source for the GDP record */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita for the year */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate for the year */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the year */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate for the year */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of GDP data */,
  "is_leap_year" INTEGER /* Indicates if the year is a leap year */,
  "total_days" INTEGER /* Total number of days in the year (365 or 366) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for GDP summary records */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country for which the summary is calculated */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Starting year of the summary period */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Ending year of the summary period */,
  "average_gdp" REAL /* Average GDP value over the specified years */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* Average GDP growth rate over the period */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Average population growth rate over the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_summary_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "gdp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GDP record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the GDP data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the GDP data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access event */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_gdp_id FOREIGN KEY ("gdp_id") REFERENCES gdp_data ("gdp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
